stemHtml: A pilot is executing an approach in VMC, but gets confused about the direction of the runway. What is the most appropriate course of action?

options.a: Continue the approach and hope for the best.
options.b: Ask ATC for vectors and prepare in case of a missed approach.
options.c: Try to visually locate the runway without contacting ATC.
options.d: Perform an immediate go-around without informing ATC.
